Name: Path: Commanding Presence
Description: Allies within 2 tiles gain +1 Accuracy and +1 Damage. When you drop an enemy to 0 Health, all nearby allies gain +2 Accuracy for 1 turn.

Name: Path: Perfect Form
Description: When wielding a single one-handed weapon, gain +2 Accuracy and +1 Damage. If you hit without being hit that round, regain 1 Health.

Name: Path: Sanguine Casting
Description: Spend up to your level Health to add that much Damage or Healing to your next spell. If the spell kills an enemy, regain half the Health spent.

Name: Path: Voice of Thunder
Description: Cast a Lightning spell as if it were one level higher. Lightning spells deal 1 Damage to targets within 2 tiles of the target.

Name: Path: Alpha Bond
Description: You may control two animal companions simultaneously. Their attacks deal +1 Damage, and both gain +2 Accuracy when within 3 tiles of you.

Name: Path: Unbound Traveler
Description: You cannot be ambushed. Movement +1 tile; after every combat, recover 3 Health and 3 Mana.

Name: Path: Silent Execution
Description: While hidden, your first attack deals +2 Damage. While in darkness or dim light, you are considered hidden.

Name: Path: Master Manipulator
Description: Attempt to Charm one intelligent creature for 3 turns, they must roll [Insight] vs [6 + Your Persuasion] to resist. Outside combat, you have advantage on negotiations and deals.

Name: Path: Unstoppable Mass
Description: Gain +2 Armor and +1 Damage when below half Health. You cannot be knocked prone or forcibly moved.

Name: Path: Living Flame
Description: Fire spells deal +X Damage, you gain resistance to the Burn Condition.

Name: Path: Glacial Guard
Description: Ice abilities Slow by 2 and grant you +X Armor for 1 turn per cast.

Name: Path: Undying Will
Description: When reduced to 0 Health, lose Half your Max Health until your next rest and stand back up with Full Health. You perish if your maximum reaches 0. The first time this triggers each combat gain +X Damage.

Name: Path: Guardian's Call
Description: Heal all allies within 2 tiles for [Your Level] Health. Upon activation, gain +1 Armor and +1 Reflex until your next turn.

Name: Path: Foresight
Description: Predict the next attack or spell within 6 tiles. You or a chosen ally gain +4 Reflex/Armor against it.

Name: Path: Temporal Surge
Description: Take an additional action this turn. Gain 1 Fatigue at the end of combat.

Name: Path: Inevitable End
Description: Deal +2 Damage to targets below half Health. When you kill an enemy, nearby foes suffer –2 Accuracy for 1 turn.

Name: Path: Battle-Hardened
Description: Reroll one failed attack or defense roll. When an ally nearby fails an attack, they gain +2 Accuracy on their next strike.

Name: Path: Master Crafter
Description: Repair or create simple crafts freely (No rolls required). During rest you may imbue 1 item with +1 Damage or +1 Armor until your next rest.

Name: Path: Predator's Edge
Description: The first attack against an ambushed or taunted target deals +2 Damage. Ignore Movement penalties from rough terrain.

Name: Path: Deep Delver
Description: Gain +2 Armor underground or in darkness. Blunt weapons deal +1 Damage and ignore 1 Armor.

Name: Path: Phase Slip
Description: Teleport up to 4 tiles. Attacks against you have –2 Accuracy until your next turn.

Name: Path: War Chorus
Description: After Attacking or Casting each turn, allies within 2 tiles gain +1 Damage on their next Attack. If an ally downs an enemy, regain 1 Mana.

Name: Path: Immovable Guard
Description: While adjacent to an ally, you may redirect one attack against them to yourself. Gain +2 Armor when doing so.

Name: Path: Lingering Hex
Description: You impose a curse on a creature, they must roll [Fortitude] resisting [6+ Your Spellcraft]. On a failure they suffer -2 Accuracy and -1 Damage for 2 Scenes.

Name: Path: Hit and Fade
Description: After making an attack, you may move 2 tiles without provoking melee attacks. If you change elevation or cover, gain +1 Accuracy on your next attack.

Name: Path: Forbidden Insight
Description: Learn one passive effect of a creature within 6 tiles. Your next attack or spell against it deals +2 Damage.

Name: Path: Martyr's Zeal
Description: Whenever you take Health damage, gain +1 Damage on your next attack. This stacks up to 3 times and resets after the attack.

Name: Path: Reflected Harm
Description: Upon taking damage; you may reflect half of that damage back at the source.

Name: Path: Last Rites
Description: Bringing an enemy to 0 Health releases a pulse of healing. You and all allies within 2 tiles are healed for [Half Your Level].

Name: Path: Quickdraw
Description: Your first ranged attack each scene gains +2 Accuracy and ignores cover penalties.

Name: Path: Living Runes
Description: Choose Accuracy or Armor; gain +2 to the chosen stat for 2 Scenes.

Name: Path: Plunder Momentum
Description: When you damage an enemy, gain +1 Movement this turn. If the enemy is defeated, gain +1 Damage on your next attack.

Name: Path: Radiant Presence
Description: When an ally is healed within 2 tiles they gain 2 points of Mantra.

Name: Path: Mutable Form
Description: You reshape your flesh, and adapt; Negative condition effects become reversed for 1 Scene.

Name: Heavy Guard
Description: When wearing Heavy armor and using a shield, gain +2 Armor.

Name: Traveler's Endurance
Description: +1 Movement and you ignore the first level of Fatigue.

Name: Arcane Spellcaster
Description: Gain access to Arcane Spellcasting. You learn a number of Arcane spells equal to your [Scholarship]. You learn 2 Arcane cantrips.

Name: Divine Spellcaster
Description: Gain access to Divine Spellcasting. You learn a number of Divine spells equal to your [Scholarship]. You learn 2 Divine cantrips.

Name: Cosmic Spellcaster
Description: Gain access to Cosmic Spellcasting. You learn a number of Cosmic spells equal to your [Scholarship], you cannot learn spells above level 1. "Upcasting" casts spells multiple times instead.

Name: Occult Spellcaster
Description: Gain access to Occult Spellcasting. You learn a number of Occult spells equal to your [Scholarship], you cannot learn spells above level 2; Spells are always upcast. You learn 2 Occult cantrips.

Name: Elemental Spellcaster
Description: Gain access to Elemental Spellcasting. You learn a number of Elemental spells equal to your [Scholarship], choose one element; spells of that element deal +X damage. You learn 2 Elemental cantrips.

Name: Cantrip Adept
Description: You learn 2 additional cantrips from your chosen spellcasting type. If you have chosen cosmic, learn 1 extra spell instead.

Name: Quick Reflexes
Description: Reduce incoming damage by half your level rounded up.

Name: Cantrip Knowledge
Description: Convert one level 1 spell from your spellcasting type into a cantrip. Cantrips can't be upcast or multicasted.

Name: Minor Channeling
Description: Cast one level 1 spell without spending Mana. Ignoring attack per turn restrictions.

Name: Chef
Description: Cook allies a meal during a rest. Eating the meal grants them +X Spirit or +X Fortitude next combat.

Name: Tavern Brawler
Description: Improvised weaponry uses the Highest proficiency tier you have and deals +1 Damage.

Name: Miner
Description: Advantage on extracting and identifying minerals. Deal +X damage to constructs and stone enemies. Ignore disadvantages from non-magical darkness.

Name: Brewer
Description: During a rest, you may attempt to create potions from your known potions list. You know a number of Potion Recipes equal to half your level rounded up, gain +X to Brewing Related Checks.

Name: Fisher
Description: When resting near water, regain half your max Health in additon to any other healing. You can fish while resting, guarantee treasure worth at least X gold.

Name: Storyteller
Description: Tell a tale; allies gain 2 Grace at the end of the rest. Gain +1 Scholarship.

Name: Gravedigger
Description: During a rest, burying a dead ally grants Grace equal to remaining allies next combat; burying an enemy restores Health equal to the number of your allies multiplied by your level.

Name: Bardic Drunk
Description: While you have the intoxicated condition, gain +X Damage.

Name: Hermit
Description: Recover additional Health when resting alone equal to your level. While no allies are within 2 tiles, gain +X Accuracy or +X-1 Armor.

Name: Street Performer
Description: Performing in public earns rewards worth at least 3 gold (Narrator's Discretion), does not consume uses. Performing in combat grants allies within 5 tiles +2 Accuracy.

Name: Candle Keeper
Description: Light sources you hold never go out (Narrator's Discretion). While in its light, gain +1 Awareness and +1 Reflex.

Name: Combat Trapper
Description:
Using [1× Common Component] you can create a trap in an adjacent unoccupied tile. The trap can activate only once, dealing X Blunt damage and applying 3 stacks of Slow to a creature that stepped on the same tile as the trap.
Using [1× Rope Component] you can create and throw a Bola. You are proficient with Bolas as a Finesse(thrown) weapon. Bolas can be thrown up to 6 tiles away doing X Blunt damage and applying 3 stacks of Slow to the creature.

Name: Conductive Wiring
Description: Using [1× Metal - Wire], you can create fences up to 4 Tiles long and 1 Unit tall. Each fence deals Stun dealing X Lightning Damage when a creature crosses it, losing 1 durability. The fence has 1 Durability.

Name: Survivalist
Description: Gain +X Accuracy against beasts and natural creatures. Gain +X on Awareness, Reflex, and Fortitude checks against natural environments.

Name: Tracer Shot
Description: Fire a glowing projectile, it marks the struck target; allies gain +1 Accuracy against the marked target.

Name: Non-lethal Shot
Description: You can choose to deal non-lethal damage with ranged attacks.

Name: Arcane Edge
Description: Melee spell effects have +X Accuracy.

Name: Elemental Draw
Description: You make an attack that deals +X elemental damage of a chosen type. Attack counts as magical.

Name: Mana Slash
Description: You can spend a number of mana equal to your level, add that amount as Damage to your next attack. Attack counts as magical.

Name: Beast Whisperer
Description: Tamed animals can be used as companions in combat.

Name: Bonded Instinct
Description: When you command your companion to strike the same target as you, it gains +X Accuracy.

Name: Spirit Bond
Description: When your companion is healed, you recover half the Health restored to your companion. You can sense through your companion within 12 tiles.

Name: Noble Steed
Description: While riding your companion, gain +2 Armor. First damage you or your mount takes each combat grants Guard equal to mount's Movement.

Name: Gumption
Description: While unarmored, gain +X Armor.

Name: Forgotten History
Description: Gain +X Scholarship while identifying or examining historical objects.

Name: Weakpoint
Description: Landing an attack grants you +X Accuracy against that target until combat ends.

Name: Secrets Of The Cosmos
Description: Occult and Cosmic spells/cantrips gain +1 Range. Learn 1 Occult cantrip and 1 Cosmic spell, bypassing type restrictions.

Name: Coward's Instinct
Description: Gain +2 tiles of Movement while moving away from enemies or when you have the feared condition.

Name: Master Of Disguise
Description: Gain +1 Speech and Finesse while disguised or attempting to blend into a crowd.

Name: Leg Day
Description: Double your Movement until next turn; your Movement is halved the following turn.

Name: Focused Strike
Description: The first melee strike you make each scene gains +X Damage.

Name: Hard Swing
Description: Add +2 Damage to your next melee attack.

Name: Focused Mind
Description: You gain +1 Spirit when resisting spell effects. If the spell is from a school you have access to, gain +2 Spirit instead.

Name: Spell Scribe
Description: You may roll [Scholarship] vs [6 + Caster Scholarship] to identify a spell, on a success, you gain +1 Arcane against its caster. Stacking up to 3 times.

Name: Ritualist's Expertise
Description: Ritual spells take half the time and grant +X Arcane on that spell.

Name: Pocket Sand
Description: As a reaction, blind a creature entering your melee range until their next turn.

Name: Remote Activation
Description: Activate an allied mechanical device, trap, or gadget within 6 tiles as a free action.

Name: Reinforced Construction
Description: Crafts and modifications you create gain +2 Durability when applicable.

Name: Craftsman
Description: You gain the ability to Craft; You start with Trivial Recipes, for each point of Scholarship above 1, increases the known complexity. You know a number of Recipes equal to half your Level rounded up.

Name: Gearwright
Description: Repair one trivial or simple craft during a rest without a check. (Requires 1 relevant component)

Name: Field Mechanic
Description: Attempt to repair a craft to full operation; Roll [Tinker] vs [Craft Complexity]. If you fail you may not attept to repair that craft again until you rest.

Name: Scrap Salvager
Description: Attempt to dismantle a craft; Roll [Tinker] vs [Craft Complexity]. On a success, gain 1 random component of the craft. If the craft had required atleast 2 components and you crafted it, gain 2 components instead.

Name: Arc Current
Description: Constructs/Machines you have deployed can expend one unit of Durability (Fuel) to shock targets within 2 tiles, dealing [Your Tinker] Lightning Damage. This counts as an attack by the machine.

Name: Charged Conduit
Description: When casting a spell through a spellcasting craft, add your Spell damage bonus to the spell's damage.

Name: Spell Interface
Description: Once per rest, imbue a spell into a machine or construct, the spell lasts for a day, and will trigger based on condition you declared at imbuement. (Complexity determines spell level, Trivial = Cantrips, Simple = level 1 etc.)

Name: Relentless Advance
Description: Moving into melee range of an enemy grants +X Accuracy for your next attack.

Name: Locksmith
Description: Open simple locks with advantage; gain +X Finesse.

Name: Companion Recall
Description: If your companion is within 10 tiles. You may teleport them to yourself and heal them by half Your Level rounded up.

Name: Pathmaker
Description: Dash into a target within 4 tiles, dealing 1 Force damage if it is an enemy.

Name: Crippling Impact
Description: The target you dash to gains 3 stacks of Slow until your next turn if it is an enemy.

Name: Crushing Impact
Description: The target you dash to takes +1 Force damage. If they are below half Health, they instead take +2 Force damage.

Name: Displacing Impact
Description: The target you dash into is pushed 3 tiles away in the direction of the dash.

Name: Switching Impact
Description: The target you dash to is swapped with your original position.

Name: Guarding Impact
Description: If you dash onto an ally, they gain Guard equal to your level; otherwise, you gain the Guard.

Name: Mechanical Assistant
Description:
Using [1× Metal - Wire, 1× Metal - Plate], construct a small mechanical assistant. It counts as a companion with the following stat block:

| Health/Durability [Your Level]
| Armor [6+Your Tinker]
| BODY 0 | SKILL 1 | MIND 2
| Traits:
- Assist: This companion assist you while crafting, smithing, brewing or casting a ritual. It grants you +2 to the relevant rolls.

Name: Spell Drone
Description:
Using [1× Metal - Wire, 1× Wooden - Core], create a flying spell drone that stays within 3 tiles of you. It counts as a companion with the following stat block:

| Health/Durability [Your Level]
| Armor [6+Your Tinker]
| BODY 0 | SKILL 1 | MIND 2
| Traits:
- Conduit (Costs 1 Durability): You cast a spell from this companions position.

Name: Combat Rover
Description:
Using [1× Metal - Wire, 1× Stone - Cut], create a small combat rover, It counts as a companion with the following stat block:

| Health/Durability [Your Level]
| Armor [6+Your Tinker]
| BODY 2 | SKILL 1 | MIND 0
| Traits:
- Melee Strike (Costs 1 Durability): Strike a target within Melee range with [2 + Your Tinker] Accuracy; It deals [1+ Your Tinker] Force Damage.

Name: Dual Wielding
Description: You can wield two Light weapons, or Medium weapons; if you have atleast 3 points of Medium weapon Proficiency, you can wield two Medium weapons. Off-hand attacks use all applicable modifiers.

Name: Assisted Strike
Description: Your companion may make a free attack against a target you attacked.

Name: Second Strike
Description: After attacking with a melee weapon, make another attack without expending an action.

Name: Guardian's Oath
Description: When an adjacent ally is attacked, take X damage to reduce that attack's damage by twice that amount.

Name: Mana Reservoir
Description: Gain a reservoir of 3 bonus Mana for level 1 spells. Can be used on level 2 spells starting at level 6.

Name: Unyielding Defense
Description: When at or below half Health, gain +X Armor and and +1 Spirit.

Name: Precision Form
Description: If your attack Accuracy exceed half (rounded up) of the enemy's Armor, gain +X Damage.

Name: Tactical Awareness
Description: Gain +X Accuracy against enemies adjacent to your allies.

Name: Enduring Spirit
Description: When below half Health, gain Guard equal to half your level + X and +2 Spirit.

Name: Steady Hand
Description: For each scene you did not take damage, you gain +1 Accuracy, stacking infinitely. Resets when you get hit.

Name: Channel Focus
Description: Casting a spell grants you Guard equal to half your level rounded up. This refreshes but does not stack.

Name: Duelist Technique
Description: While wielding a single one-handed weapon, gain +X Armor and +X Reflex.

Name: Crushing Blow
Description: You make a melee attack that deals +X Damage and you suffer -Y Movement this turn.

Name: Executioner's Edge
Description: Deal +2 Damage to enemies at half Health or lower.

Name: Resolute Will
Description: Ignore the first negative condition each rest, as long as it is not instantly reapplied. Gain +1 Fortitude.

Name: Perfectionist Strike
Description: On a hit, you deal bonus Damage to the target equal to half the amount your attack exceeded the target's Armor. On a miss, take Damage equal to half the amount you missed by.

Name: Focus Breaker
Description: Damaging a spellcaster causes them to lose 1 Mana (doubled on Midnights).

Name: Adaptive Guard
Parameters: ⫘ Medium Armor Proficiency / Heavy Armor Proficiency
Description: If an enemy attacks you twice in one combat, gain +X Armor against that enemy for the rest of combat.

Name: Blood Pact
Description: Spend up to your level in Health to deal half that amount (rounded up, minimum 1) as bonus Damage.

Name: Blacksmith
Description: Repair gear during rest. Restored gear gains +1 Damage or +1 Armor, the Bonus has 3 Durability. Gain +X Tinker

Name: Treasure Hunter
Description: Gain +2 Finesse for looting. While exploring new areas you have +X Movement.

Name: Cartographer
Description: Gain advantage on Scholarship checks when recalling known locations. When resting in a previously visited area, you cannot be ambushed.

Name: Restorative Meditation
Description: During rest recover X Additonal Mana.

Name: Focused Conduit
Description: Your first spell each combat costs no Mana and gains +2 Range.

Name: Mana Conservation
Description: When one of your spells is countered, regain its Mana cost + 1.

Name: Mana Flow
Description: Defeating an enemy with a spell refunds its Mana cost.

Name: Spell Specialization
Description: Choose one known spell; it gains +2 Damage, Range, and Healing when applicable. Reduce known spells by 1. You may change out the chosen spells when you level up.

Name: Aimed Shot
Description: Make a ranged attack with +X Accuracy and +X-1 Damage.

Name: Quick Reload
Description: Reloading a firearm no longer costs an action. But can still only be done once per turn.

Name: Tracking Expertise
Description: You have the ability to freely identify tracks and Movement signs. Gain +X Awareness against hidden or fleeing enemies.

Name: Piercing Shot
Description: Fire through up to two targets in a line. The first target takes +2 Damage. You only need to hit the first target.

Name: Sudden Camouflage
Description: Hitting an enemy causes attacks against you to suffer -X Accuracy until your next turn.

Name: Explosive Ammunition
Description: Make a Ranged attack that explodes in a 1-tile radius, the explosion deals the attack's damage +X to all targets in the area.

Name: Elemental Coating
Description: During a rest, modify six shots of ammunition to deal +X Elemental Damage of a chosen type.

Name: Bounding Retreat
Description: After you make a ranged attack, move 3 tiles without provoking opportunity attacks.

Name: Crippling Shot
Description: Make a ranged attack that that applies 3 Stacks of Slow to the target for X turns.

Name: Runic Impact
Description: When you hit with a melee attack, expend 1 Mana to trigger a level 1 spell at the hit's location.

Name: Runic Shot
Description: When you hit with a ranged attack, expend 1 Mana to trigger a level 1 spell at the hit's location.

Name: Ranged Conduit
Description: You may cast cantrips through ranged attacks. On activation, you may instead cast a level 1 spell for free.

Name: Spirit Conduit
Description: You may cast spells from your companion's position.

Name: Arcane Link
Description: Your companion gains a Mana pool of 4. You may spend its Mana while it is within 6 tiles of you.

Name: Unseen Strike
Description: The first melee attack each combat is an automatic hit if performed from behind or above (no Midnights).

Name: Quick Cast
Description: Cast one spell as a Free Action instead of an Action. (Does not bypass attack limit per turn.)

Name: Spontaneous Insight
Description: Reroll a die on any skill check. You gain only 1 Grace regardless of outcome.

Name: Duelist's Prowess
Description: While wielding a single one-handed weapon, your critical success range expands down to 10. Misses do not consume charges.

Name: Battlefield Awareness
Description: When an enemy moves adjacent, you may react to move 2 tiles without provoking opportunity attacks. Enemies within 10 tiles suffer stealth penalties equal to your Awareness.

Name: Vanishing Act
Description: When you take damage you may use your reaction to immediately perform an attack with halved Damage (Rounded up) and you may move up to 2 tiles. This does not trigger an opportunity attack.

Name: Parry
Description: When hit by a melee (or ranged at level 6) attack, contest the roll with an Reflex check. On success, ignore the damage.

Name: Braced Stance
Description: You count as one size larger for grappling checks.

Name: Jury-Rig
Description: Restore a broken craft to 1 Durability for a scene. While active, it gains +2 Damage/Healing when applicable.

Name: Lucky Fella
Description: You gain +2 On all Gambling / Luck related checks.

Name: Carrying Mule
Description: You have +5 Maximum Encumberance

Name: Pocket Aces
Description: You gain Advantage on all Gambling / Luck related checks.

Name: Compelling Invite
Description: All adjacent enemies become Taunted

Name: Field Medic
Description: Allies resting with you receive double healing, you can remove 1 Condition per ally once per combat.

Name: Constructive Trapper
Description: [2× Common Component]: Create a trapped 2x2 area, it can trap multiple creatures, it will only trigger when a declared condition is met, the conditon is set upon deployment. Trapped creatures take X damage and applies 3 stacks of Slow until your next turn.

Name: Deployment Trapper
Description: Traps you can deploy can be deployed within a range of 5 tiles.

Name: Guerrilla Trapper
Description:
You can deploy 2 normal traps, or 1 Large trap during a rest.
Normal traps: Combat Trapper traps.
Large traps: Constructive Trapper traps

Name: Explosive Trapper
Description:
Traps you deploy may, when triggered, deal +1 Damage in a 1 tile radius.

Large traps explosions count as a 4x4 square.

Name: Binding Trapper
Description: Traps you deploy now knock enemies Prone or Blind them, stated at the time of deployment, they must roll [Reflex] vs [6 + Tinker] to resist.

Name: Combat Guard
Description: Taunting enemies grants 1 Guard per enemy taunted. Guard gain is doubled for enemies larger than you.

Name: Recovery
Description: Each scene you have guard, recover X Health

Name: Back To Back We Stand
Description:
Choose an Ally or Companion, this choice can only be changed uppon leveling up.

While they are within 1 tile of you, gain +1 Accuracy and +1 Armor. Each point of damage they take can be reduced if you take double the amount of damage instead. You have +2 Movement while moving towards them.

Name: Suppressive Fire
Description: Unleash a 4 Tile cone of projectiles. Creatures within it must seek the nearest cover as a reaction, if they do not find any, or do not have a reaction, they take 2 Damage.

Name: Berserk
Description: You gain the ability to enter a Rage state. In this state you lose 6 Armor, and gain +X Damage and +X Accuracy. This state lasts until dismissed, unconscious or end of combat.

Name: Natural Defenses
Description: While in Rage, you gain Resistances to Blunt, Slash, Pierce and Cleave Damage.

Name: Bodyslam
Description: You slam your body against a target within melee range. You lose all of your guard, and deal that much Damage to the target.

Name: Great Weapon Mastery
Description: Heavy Weapons deal +X Damage, but suffer -3 Accuracy

Name: Blood Vigor
Description: When you defeat an enemy, recover X Health

Name: Momentum Drive
Description: Consecutive hits against the same target grant you +1 Damage, stacking up to +4, missing or switching targets resets the stack.

Name: Counter Stance
Description: When a Taunted creature strikes you, they take X Damage. The Damage type matches your weapons type.

Name: Spellbreaker
Description: When a spell is cast within 3 tiles, you may negate its effects. You can only do this before rolls are made.

Name: Ethereal Step
Description:
Move up to 5 tiles, you ignore terrain penalties, you may pass through 1 obstructed tile in your way. During Movement you may refresh this ability to pass through multiple tiles, however your Movement does not refresh.

Obstructions must not be larger than 1 tile, relative to the direction you are moving through them.

Name: Healing Pulse
Description: Heal all allies within 3 tiles for X Health.

Name: Spell Echo
Description: Repeat the last spell cast for free.

Name: Minor Syphoned Healing
Description: When you cast a healing or support spell, you or one ally regain X Health

Name: Cursed Cycle
Description: When one of your controlled or cursed targets is defeated, move the curse to a new target and refresh its duration.

Name: Camper's Discipline
Description: If you did not move this turn, your next ranged attack gains +X Damage and +Y Accuracy.

Name: Arc Shot
Description: When targeting creatures behind partial cover, gain +2 Accuracy

Name: Tough
Description: You have bonus Max Health, equal to your trait point maximum

Name: Feat Forward
Description: You gain 2 Feat points.

Name: Mana Sap
Description: Mana you drain from Spellcasters replenishes your Mana.

Name: Symbiotic Flow
Description: When you cast a spell, your companion's next attack deals +X Damage; when it attacks, your next spell deals +X-1 Damage

Name: Phoenix Recovery
Description: Upon reaching 0 Health, recover 6 Health and immediately take another turn.

Name: Arcane Detonation
Description: Release All Mana; deal 2 Force damage per Mana spent to enemies within 2 tiles; you gain 2 Fatigue.

Name: Last Stand
Description: While at or below half Health, gain +2 Damage, +1 Armor and +1 Spirit.

Name: Overflow
Description: While at full Mana, your cantrips deal +X Damage.

Name: Elemental Reflection
Description: Enemy spells targeting you matching your chosen element, suffer a -X Accuracy penalty.

Name: Eternal Discipline
Description: Two trait uses restore automatically after each combat.

Name: Eternal Guardian
Description: When your chosen Ally/Companion falls to 0 Health, they remain at 1 Health and gain +2 Armor until the end of their next turn.

Name: Arcane Sniper
Description: Arcane spells gain +4 Range.

Name: Major Syphoned Healing
Description: When you cast a healing spell, extend its effect to one ally or you at full strength.

Name: Cosmic Protection
Description: Each cast of a Cosmic spell grants +1 Guard.

Name: Occult Dominion
Description: Occult Curses, Brands, Marks and Hexes gain +1 Target.

Name: Master Channeler
Description: Spell Mana restores fully on a rest; you also recover 2 Mana after each combat.

Name: Darkness Rise
Description:
After landing 3 Attacks you begin to emit a 1 tile radius Zone of Death.

Zone of Death: Counts as Rough terrain. Each scene, or when entering the zone, Enemies take X Dark Damage. If the zone has not damaged a target for 2 Scenes, it dissapates.

Name: Second Shot
Parameters: ★ Double Strike ⫘ Level 6+, Any Ranged Proficiency
Description: After attacking with a ranged weapon, you may make another attack without expending an action.

Name: Dead Horizon
Description: Make one ranged attack with +X Damage, piercing all enemies in a 6 tile line. If any enemy dies to this, regain the traits use. Targets must roll [Reflex] vs the attack roll.

Name: Eldritch Convergence
Description: When you attack a target affected by yours or an allies Debuff, that attack deals +X Dark Damage.

Name: Enduring Rage
Description: When you enter Rage, gain Guard equal to your Level + 2.

Name: Workers Companion
Description: Companions each grant +1 Tinker when brewing, crafting, smithing, medicine, cooking or ritual casting.

Name: Longshot
Description: Ranged weapons and traits, gain +X range

Name: Enticipation
Description: You cannot attack this round, gain X Guard until your next attack.

Name: Against The Odds
Description: If enemies outnumber allies within a 5×5 radius, you gain Armor equal to the difference. Enemies at least 2 sizes larger than you count as two.

Name: Thick Skin
Description: After combat, recover half of your missing health.

Name: Twoification
Description: Allies within 2 tiles gain +2 Movement and +2 range for 2 turns.

Name: Sunblessed
Description: Gain +X Armor while in direct sunlight, -X Armor when in darkness.

Name: Giant Slayer
Description: While targeting a creature thats at least 1 size larger than you, you gain +1 Damage and +1 Accuracy.

Name: Climber
Description: You gain advantage on climbing checks, while not moving and on a wall, you cannot be knocked off it.

Name: Carpenter
Description: You can convert between wooden components freely. You gain advantage when crafting with wooden components.

Name: Combat Carpenter
Description: You can create an improvised melee or finesse weapon from any number of wooden components as an action, it has 1 Durability and deals Blunt damage equaling the number of components used. If it is a thrown finesse weapon it has a range of 5.

Name: Drama Queen
Description: You attempt to convince creatures targeting you that you are dead. You are knocked prone; affected creatures must roll [Insight] vs [8 + your Speech] to resist; Creatures you have already tricked will gain +2 to the roll.

Name: Seamstress
Description: You can convert between cloth components freely. You can use cloth components to copy a peice of clothing or cloth equipment, the copied item has the same stats but looses any prefixes. You can also create 1 rope component from 2 cloth components.

Name: Makeup Maid
Description: Outside of combat, you may disguise yourself or allies. Creatures attempting to see through the disguise must roll [Insight] vs [6 + your Speech] to resist.

Name: Shumpo
Description: In combat, rolling a Midnight no longer doubles damage; instead, you gain one stack of Haste, which may be used to attack.

Name: Fair Strike
Description: The chosen target's next attack loses all modifiers and deals only base weapon damage.

Name: Fair Fight
Description: You create a 3×3 zone you must occupy on cast. Cantrips and Spells cannot be cast within it, and spells or cantrips from outside cannot target creatures inside. The zone lasts 3 Scenes, or ends immediately if you leave the zone.

Name: Commanding Presence
Description: You command a creature within 6 tiles to lay down its arms, it will not act for 2 scenes, or until damaged. It must roll [Insight] vs [6 + your Speech] to resist.

Name: All Warmed Up
Description: After you have spent all of your mana for the first time in combat, your non-cantrip spells gain +2 Damage.

Name: Jeweler
Description: During a rest, you can restore a found object and increase its perceived market value. The increase is +X Gold.

Name: Fearsome Sight
Description: Gain advantage on Intimidation(Speech) checks. On a Midnight impose the Feared Condition on the target.

Name: Crimson Convergence
Description: Healing beyond your max HP is converted into Guard, up to a maximum of 2 + (X times your level).

Name: Convenience Fee
Description: When a creature within 6 tiles is healed by their ally, you may reduce that healing by (your level + X) and heal yourself for the amount reduced.

Name: Redoubled Valor
Description: While you have no known spells; When you are given a buff by an ally, you may choose to double its duration or effect.

Name: Ghost
Description: You cannot be targeted by ANY creature until you make your next attack or the start of your next turn, whichever comes first.

Name: Rush
Description: If you haven't acted this scene, swap initiative with a target. The target acts immediately, and you act on their original turn.

Name: High Guard
Description: When Obstructing aim, you count as half cover.

Name: Stone Skin
Description: Casting Earth spells, or using Earth elemental effects, grants 2 Guard, stacking.

Name: Guardian
Description: Grant an ally [4 + your Fortitude] Guard, it dissipates the first time they attack.

Name: Death's Respite
Description: Give whichever ally has the highest current health (yourself included), immunity to death for 1 scene. If they were to drop below 1 Health, they remain at 1 Health

Name: Make It Rain
Description: You fire a number of shots into the sky equal to your highest Ranged Proficiency, these will land and hit random targets within 8 tiles. They deal 1 Damage, and prioritize Enemies.

Name: Thought Out Plan
Description: As long as you have not acted this turn, you may skip it. Next turn you have 3 Actions.

Name: Combat Wingman
Description: Allies have advantage against enemies Taunted by you.

Name: Wingman
Description: Your chosen ally/companion gains Advantage on Speech checks.

Name: Mystic Sacrifice
Description: Deal 4 Damage to yourself to receive 2 Mana

Name: Unshakeable
Description: You gain [6 + Your Level + Your Fortitude] Guard, you cannot Move, Be Moved or Attack while this guard is active. (Can be removed with any Cleanse Effects.)

Name: Transfusion
Description: Deal up to 3 Damage to yourself, heal a creature other than yourself, for double that amount.

Name: Blade Spin
Description: Deal half Your Level rounded up damage in a 1 tile radius around you. Taunted enemies take damage an additional time. Creatures must roll [Reflex] vs [8 + your Weapon Proficiency] to resist the damage. The damage type matches your weapon.

Name: Ruthless Predator
Description: Your Opportunity attacks deal +2 Damage.

Name: Dummies
Description: You may spend this reaction at any point. You move to an unoccupied space within 3 tiles, you leave a Target Dummy with 3 Durability where you were standing. Any attacks targeting you are redirected to the dummy.

Name: Mirror Disciplines
Description: You gain either +2 Armor or +2 Accuracy until your next turn.

Name: Mark Of Death
Description: Transfer any and all negative conditions from yourself to a target within 9 tiles. You don't need to see the target, just know of its presence.

Name: Convenience Tax
Description: Drain 3 mana from an ally within 6 tiles, add it to yourself.

Name: Guaranteed Yield
Description: Any Damage, or Guard gain with a base value lower than X is increased to X.

Name: Morning Light
Description: Treat the next Action of a chosen ally, or yourself, as if it were the first action they have taken this combat.

Name: Pirouette
Description: Deal 1 Damage to all Adjacent creatures. If this is your first attack in combat, it deals damage twice. Creatures must roll [Reflex] vs [6 + your Weapon Proficiency] to resist. The damage type matches your weapon.

Name: Reluctance
Description: Remove all weapon proficiencies of a target until your next turn.

Name: Overexertion
Description: You may activate traits, while you have no uses left. Doing so grants 1 point of fatigue per activation.

Name: Vigor
Description: Spend all of your grace, granting yourself that amount of Guard.

Name: Measured Restraint
Description: You lose access to a spell of your choice until your next sleep. You replenish Double its Mana cost as Mana.

Name: Veiled Blessing
Description: You can no longer be Healed or gain Guard from allies. You have +X Armor.

Name: Time Crunch
Description: Starting after your turn ends, and lasting for 4 Scenes; Everyone's turn consists of only 1 Action.

Name: One Of Each
Description: You gain +2 Damage on ALL attacks. You cannot use the same attack multiple times per combat. Lasts until your next rest.

Name: Toss Me
Description: You can throw a grappled creature at least 1 size smaller than you. They are treated as a Finesse(thrown) weapon you are proficient with, and have a max range of [3+ Your Might Total]. If the thrown creature is an ally, they may make an attack on landing; otherwise, they deal damage equal to [your Might total].

Name: Loaded Dice
Description: Make an attack that deals bonus damage equal to your Grace, then reset your Grace. Grace cannot increase Accuracy for this attack.

Name: Riposte
Description: If you took Guard damage without your Guard being fully depleted, make an attack against the creature that hit you.

Name: Risky Strike
Description: Make a X Damage Melee, Finesse or Ranged strike with your weapon, if the target dies you gain an amount of Gold. (Narators discretion)

Name: Rite Of Dominance
Description: Deal 4 Damage to yourself; The next 3 enemy attacks in a 2 tile radius have their damage reduced by 2.

Name: Rite Of Negation
Description: When a spell is cast within 8 tiles, you may counter it; doing so causes you to lose access to a spell you know of your choice until your next rest.

Name: Rite Of Calling
Description: You lose 4 armor, 3 enemies within 8 tiles suffer -3 Accuracy until the end of combat.

Name: Sharing Is Caring
Description: When an ally within 8 tiles casts a spell, you may pay for it with your Mana instead.

Name: Catalyst Of Aeons
Description: You can repair Durability of Crafts or Craft Companions using Mana or Health; Each point of Durability is equal to 4 Mana or, 2 Health.

Name: Intimidating Roar
Description: You stun all enemies with their Current Health below [Your Level] within a 6 tile radius.

Name: Take A Moment
Description: When you reload a firearm, you recover half Your Level rounded up Health

Name: Survival Skills
Description: At the start of each Scene you gain Guard equal to the number of times you were attacked last Scene.

Name: One For All
Description: Any guard you gain is evenly divided among you and your allies.

Name: All For One
Description: Half of any guard gained by your allies (rounded up) is instead given to you.

Name: All Out
Description: For the next 2 Scenes you lose 4 Armor and gain +4 Accuracy

Name: Mana Burn
Description: All your mana costs are reduced by 1. You lose 2 Health, each time you cast a spell.

Name: Boiling Blood
Description: Spells cost no mana, instead pay [Double the Spell level] as Health. Mana Burn no longer has an effect.

Name: Light Footed
Description: If you have traveled at least 8 tiles; You gain +3 Reflex and +3 Armor for 2 Scenes

Name: Sojourners
Description: Whenever you receive a Buff from an ally you can apply a copy of the Buff to another ally.

Name: Slam Dunk
Description: If you climb a wall or jump over an obstacle, you can jump at an enemy and attack with your weapon; doing +X Damage. An ally can also offer a boost, as a reaction, to perform this attack.

Name: Return
Description: Finesse(thrown) weapons return to your hand at the end of your turn.

Name: Loser's Fallacy
Description: Single-target Trait Attacks deal bonus damage equal to the granting trait's point cost. This effect stacks.

Name: Syphoning Whirlpool
Description: You deal 1 Force Damage to all Adjacent Enemies; You regain Mana equal to the Damage dealt.

Name: Deep Pockets
Description: Spend 2 mana to create one Crafting Component; if unused the Component disappears on your next rest.

Name: Even Deeper Pockets
Description: When summoning a component; You may pay +2 Mana, and instead gain one Trivial Craft. It will disappear next rest.

Name: Guillotine
Description: You deal +3 Damage to Prone Enemies

Name: Behold The Infinite
Description: Gain 6 bonus Spells from your Spellcasting School; These spells can only be cast if you Pay for them using Grace.

Name: Bodybuilder
Description: You gain +1 to Might and Speech.

Name: Battle Ready
Description: During the first Scene of combat, all of your Spells cost 2 Less Mana

Name: Leg Sweep
Description: Perform a non-Damaging melee attack; If the attack hits the target is knocked prone.

Name: Evasive Stance
Description: You gain bonus Armor equal to the amount of Movement over 5.

Name: Snipers Nest
Description: While Prone you have Advantage on Non-Spell Ranged Attacks.

Name: Personal Vendetta
Description: You Taunt a target up to 6 tiles away. If your weapons range exceeds this amount, use that range instead.

Name: Bloodlust
Description: While in Rage; You ignore Attack per turn restrictions, however you cannot take any actions that would not deal damage. You lose the ability to dismiss your Rage.

Name: Returned Investment
Description: For every turn you do not cast a spell, you reduce the cost of the next spell cast by 1.

Name: Bypassed
Description: You learn 1 cantrip originating from outside your Spellcasting School. (If you have no Spellcasting School, you can choose any cantrip.)

Name: Blindfold Training
Description: The blind condition no longer imposes Disadvantage, instead it becomes a -2; Enemy attacks no longer have Advantage against you, instead it becomes a +2.

Name: Steadfast
Description: Reduce all Incoming Damage by 1 (Minimum of 1 Damage taken).

Name: Bookies Choice
Description: Lose access to cantrips, gaining Maximum Mana equal to the number of cantrips lost. Future cantrips are also converted.

Name: Strike The Hand
Description: You make an attack with your Melee Weapon, attempting to disarm an enemy. They must roll [Fortitude] vs [6 + Your Might] to resist.

Name: High Road
Description: Gain [3+ your Spirit] Grace at the start of combat, if you had spared a life last combat.

Name: Self Defense
Description: You gain +2 Accuracy against creatures Taunted by you.

Name: Lead And Follow
Description: When you see an Ally perform a Trait granted attack action, you may do the same Action against the same target, if you also have that Trait.

Name: Blunt Impact
Description: The target you dash to becomes Stunned if you have a shield equipped.

Name: Sharesies
Description: Throw your ally a weapon, if you are proficient with it, they also become proficient with it, matching your level of proficiency, until the end of combat.

Name: Patient
Description: You start Combat with 1 Mantra Stack, Your Mantra Stacks cannot drop below 1. All healing you receive is given to you as Stacks of Mantra instead.

Name: Reckless
Description: While in Rage; Your Armor becomes 0, All Melee Damage you deal is doubled.

Name: Disagreeable Aegis
Description: When you are struck by a projectile and you have guard; Reflect the projectile towards the person that attacked you, treat it as a ranged attack originating from you.

Name: Mana Blast
Description: This trait does not gain uses on a rest. Each time you cast a level 2 Spell you gain 1 use. Make a Ranged attack that uses [Arcane] as its bonus, dealing 3 damage to a creature within 6 tiles.

Name: Hostage Taker
Description: While grappling a creature attacks no longer have Advantage against you.

Name: No Restraints
Description: Deal double Damage to Guard.

Name: Treaded Ground
Description: While traveling on tiles an Ally has already traveled on this Scene, you gain +3 Movement.

Name: Gracious
Description: You start combat with Grace equal to half your level rounded up.

Name: Inspirational
Description: You can no longer generate Grace, nor can you use as you normally would; You may use 1 Grace point to grant yourself or an ally Advantage.

Name: Artillery Mage
Description: Your Spells no longer cost Mana; But they cost 2 Actions to cast.

Name: Lead Role
Description: Gain +1 Speech; When you spend grace on an attack roll it deals bonus Damage equal to [your Speech]

Name: Comfy Napper
Description: You gain the full benefits of sleep even if you sleep 6 hours or less.

Name: Gardener
Description: Gain Advantage on checks needed to care for or identify plants.

Name: Merchant
Description: While negotiating the price of an item, you gain advantage on the check.

Name: Sizeable Swing
Description: You perform a large Swing with your Melee weapon, it deals +1 Damage in a 2 Tile Cone. Creatures in the area must roll [Reflex] vs [6 + your Weapon Proficiency] to resist. The damage type matches your weapon.

Name: Answered Prayer
Description: During your rest you may perform a 30 minute ritual; doing so grants you X Grace after the Rest concludes.

Name: Musician
Description: You can play your chosen instrument and are proficient with it as an improvised weapon using your highest weapon proficiency, if it is used as a thrown or ranged weapon, it has 6 units of range. While playing, allies within hearing range gain either [your Speech - 1] Armor or [your Speech] Accuracy.

Name: Sailor
Description: You deal +1 Damage to water-based creatures. Gain advantage on Scholarship and Awareness checks regarding ports, sailing or islands. You can determine North while viewing any type of sky.

Name: Sharp Nose
Description: Gain advantage on checks involving smell such as detecting poison, tracking, identifying substances and alike.

Name: Hard Target
Description: Cover grants one higher tier of protection. While in cover, gain +2 Accuracy. You may move between covers that is at maximum 4 tiles apart as a Free Action.

Name: Combat Artisan
Description: You gain Access to Combat Crafts, which you can craft in the middle of combat; You know a number of Combat Crafts equal to half your level rounded up. You start with Trivial Recipes, for each point of Scholarship above 1, increases the known complexity.

Name: Master Thrower
Description: Any throwable item you use deals +X Damage. Improvised thrown weapons now use your highest finesse weapon proficiency.

Name: Focus
Description: You may spend any amount of Grace to recharge the same amount of Mana.

Name: Range
Description: You may spend any amount of Grace to increase the Range of ranged/finesse(thrown) attacks or spells by the same amount.

Name: Dexterity
Description: You may spend any amount of Grace to gain the same amount of Speed stacks.

Name: Hasted
Description: Spend 6 Grace to gain 1 Haste stack.

Name: Scroll Of A Madman
Description: Gain +3 Scholarship. You permanently gain the Madness Condition.

Name: Soul Slash
Description: Enemies you pass through while dashing take 2 Dark Damage. You heal for the total Damage dealt.

Name: Unstoppable Force
Description: Enter a Rage, while ragining you ignore all negative conditions and effects imposed uppon you. Your Rage ends at the end of a turn in which you did not attack.
